title: Donation controversy
excerpt: We would like to address the recent controversy about one of the owners of Mullvad making a donation to a Swedish political party.
content_html:
We would like to address the recent controversy about one of the owners of Mullvad making a donation to a Swedish political party.

It was a private donation from Daniel the individual. Mullvad or its parent and sister companies did not endorse and were not involved in it. Since it has attracted attention and questions we still think it appropriate to comment.

Mullvad is a political company. We fight for freedom of speech, freedom of information and the right to privacy. One way we achieve this is to make products and services that counteract censorship and mass surveillance. Another way is to support and/or develop privacy and security enhancing open source technologies such as WireGuard, Tor, Qubes, GrapheneOS, Sigsum and System Transparency. A third way is to do political campaigning against proposals such as Chat Control and identity verification.

When doing such political campaigning we are careful in not taking political stances outside of our narrow areas of focus. Because we want to cooperate with everyone. Customers, employees, suppliers and many types of collaboration partners. The more people and organizations who can agree to set aside their other differences and work towards these common goals, the more progress can be made on these goals.

We have nurtured a culture of radical tolerance. Even when some in our sphere of collaborators have advocated for actors and views that have personally and severely affected the founders and their family members, this has not stood in the way of cooperation.

This mindset becomes necessary when considering what Mullvad is, what it does, and why. As we have written for a long time, privacy and free exchange of information are a net benefit to society. Importantly because they enable open debate and the free exchange of ideas. Sometimes it is the most persecuted ideas who win out and become self-evident truths of later history.

All over the world, but different everywhere, there are obstacles to open debate and the free exchange of ideas. There are blocks, surveillance, identification requirement and legal or social consequences. Self-censorship out of fear is an even bigger dampener than direct censorship. Mullvad helps people everywhere to avoid these obstacles. Many of these people are heroes. Others are the opposite. Some will say and do things using Mullvad that others think are despicable. This is part of the package. We want to liken Mullvad to a force of nature. Or to cryptography. It just mechanically does its thing with no human arbiters. Also protecting ideas one does not agree with is the only way to have a neutral field where truth can be found.

It should be clear by now how the party donation relates to this. Mullvad does not condone it, nor condemn it. It most likely was a bad idea; most things where there are a multitude of conflicting opinions necessarily are. But societies need a great diversity of ideas, initiatives and organizations who can be tested and sifted until the best ones remain. Ideally through rational debate.

Daniel's rationale and points of view can be read on his personal blog.

Mullvad will continue to keep its values and mission separate from the broader views of its founders. Not least because the founders have always been in strong disagreement on important issues, including this one. This narrow focus has served us well for 17 years and will do so going forward too.

content_html_zh:
我们想解决最近有关 Mulvad 的一位所有者向瑞典政党捐款的争议。

这是丹尼尔个人的私人捐赠。 Mulvad 或其母公司和姐妹公司没有认可也没有参与其中。 由于它引起了关注和质疑，我们仍然认为发表评论是合适的。

Mulvad 是一家政治公司。 我们为言论自由、信息自由和隐私权而奋斗。 我们实现这一目标的方法之一是生产能够抵制审查和大规模监视的产品和服务。 另一种方法是支持和/或开发增强隐私和安全性的开源技术，例如 WireGuard、Tor、Qubes、GrapheneOS、Sigsum 和 System Transparency。 第三种方法是针对聊天控制和身份验证等提案进行政治竞选。

在进行此类政治竞选活动时，我们会小心谨慎，不要在我们狭窄的关注领域之外采取政治立场。 因为我们想和大家合作。 客户、员工、供应商和多种类型的协作伙伴。 越多的人和组织同意抛开其他分歧并努力实现这些共同目标，在这些目标上就能取得更大的进展。

我们培育了一种激进宽容的文化。 即使我们领域的一些合作者所倡导的行动者和观点对创始人及其家庭成员个人产生了严重影响，但这并没有妨碍合作。

当考虑 Mulvad 是什么、它做什么以及为什么这样做时，这种心态就变得非常必要。 正如我们长期以来所写的那样，隐私和信息的自由交换对社会来说是净效益。 重要的是，因为它们可以实现公开辩论和自由交流思想。 有时，最受迫害的思想最终胜出，并成为后来历史中不言而喻的真理。

在世界各地，但各地情况不同，公开辩论和自由交流思想都存在障碍。 存在封锁、监视、身份识别要求以及法律或社会后果。 出于恐惧而进行的自我审查比直接审查更具抑制力。 Mulvad 帮助世界各地的人们避免这些障碍。 其中许多人都是英雄。 其他人则相反。 有些人会用 Mulvad 说一些别人认为卑鄙的事情，做一些别人认为卑鄙的事情。 这是包的一部分。 我们想把穆尔瓦德比作自然的力量。 或者密码学。 它只是机械地做自己的事情，没有人类仲裁者。 此外，保护人们不同意的观点是建立一个可以找到真理的中立领域的唯一方法。

现在应该清楚党的捐款与此有何关系。 穆尔瓦德既不纵容也不谴责这种行为。 这很可能是个坏主意。大多数事情必然存在大量相互冲突的意见。 但社会需要各种各样的想法、倡议和组织，这些想法、倡议和组织可以经过测试和筛选，直到留下最好的。 最好通过理性辩论。

丹尼尔的理由和观点可以在他的个人博客上阅读。

Mulvad 将继续将其价值观和使命与其创始人的更广泛观点区分开来。 尤其是因为创始人在重要问题上一直存在强烈分歧，包括这一问题。 这种狭隘的关注已经为我们带来了 17 年的良好效益，并且在未来也将继续如此。
